objective: Add a read-only `carto stats` command that loads the graph, calls graphStats(), and prints pluralised node/edge counts in one line.
key_changes: Register `.command('stats')` in cli.ts following the existing read-only pattern (like `list`)
Action handler: `load()` → `graphStats()` → two ternaries for singular/plural → `console.log(chalk.green(...))`
Pluralisation: `nodes === 1 ? 'node' : 'nodes'`, `edges === 1 ? 'edge' : 'edges'` — logic stays in cli.ts only
No flags, no arguments, no save() call — command is purely read-only
Empty/missing graph prints `0 nodes, 0 edges` via load()'s existing empty-graph default
No data model changes, no persistence changes, no graph.ts modifications
No new unit tests — pure logic covered by T01; CLI handler is I/O-only thin shell
Manual smoke-test coverage: empty graph, single node, multiple nodes and edges
